LAW AND MOTION, 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER OPPENHEIMER & CO.INC. A CORPORATION'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO SERVE RESPONDENT WITH THE NOTICE OF MOTION AND ACCOMPANYING PAPERS. MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER OPPENHEIMER & CO. INC.'s Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PETITIONER DID NOT PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE, INDICATIVE OF STATUTORY SUFFICIENT NOTICE AND SERVICE.
